comment: Synthetic metastatic gastric adenocarcinoma, GEJ Siewert II, HER2-negative (IHC 0), PD-L1 CPS 18 (22C3 IHC), MSS, ECOG 1. Engine routes ALGO-GASTRIC-METASTATIC-1L step 1 (HER2- → no high-risk-biology fire) → step 2 (RF-GASTRIC-PDL1-CPS-1-PLUS fires on pdl1_cps≥1, HER2-negative) → IND-GASTRIC-METASTATIC-1L-PDL1-CHEMO-ICI (FOLFOX+nivolumab, CheckMate-649 CPS≥5 mOS 14.4 vs 11.1, NCCN cat 1; FDA approves regardless of CPS, EMA restricts ≥5).
